creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Santhosh Raju from comment #11)
> Since this fix won't be ported back to 68.x.y ...

68.1.0 and 60.9.0 have the fix. 68.0.3 won't happen as 69.0 already has RC1 with release scheduled on 2019-09-03.

(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #12)
Doesn't matter. Reviewing patches against security/vuxml is ports-secteam@ job. I'm strongly biased against that team for bloating VuXML with CVE copy-pasta and the crappy work they do with MFH approvals.
